title: lithospermum longifolium
intro: Lithospermum longifolium, also known as Gromwell, is a perennial plant in the borage family that is native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lithospermum longifolium include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and supporting respiratory health. Lithospermum longifolium is often prepared as a tea or tincture and can also be found in topical creams and ointments for skin conditions.
